hero.description: I build REST APIs, microservices, and integrations in fintech environments. I care about system design, user impact, and real outcomes — not just closing tickets.

about.title: About
about.paragraph_1: I'm a Backend Engineer and Product Engineer based in Córdoba, Argentina, working at Techforb / Creditú in a fintech context. My day-to-day involves building and evolving REST APIs, microservices, and external integrations — with a focus on performance, resilience, and observability.
about.paragraph_2: I think about software from both sides: the technical and the product. I care about user impact, not just technical correctness. I use logs, metrics, and feedback to make better decisions, iterate fast, and avoid over-engineering.

mindset.title: How I Think
mindset.subtitle: Engineering principles I apply every day.
mindset.card1_desc: Before writing a line of code, I ask what problem we're actually solving and why it matters to the user.
mindset.card2_desc: Quality, simplicity, speed, and maintainability are always in tension. I name the trade-off and make a conscious choice.
mindset.card3_desc: Production behavior is the best source of truth. I use structured logs and observability to inform better decisions.
mindset.card4_desc: A working solution shipped today beats a perfect solution shipped never. I scope small, deliver, and improve.
mindset.card5_desc: If extra complexity doesn't add proportional value, it's a liability. I keep things as simple as the problem allows.

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Selected work that shows my technical judgment.

stack.title: Tech Stack
stack.subtitle: Tools and practices I work with.

writing.title: Writing
writing.subtitle: I write about backend engineering, product thinking, and the craft of building software.
